objective: Schrijf een Nederlands gedicht dat grappig is en niet cringe over goblin of gremlins, niet over kikkers, van EXACT 99 woorden.

prompt_versions.note: Initial prompt: made the constraints explicit, including exact 99-word count, no title, and a silent self-check to improve compliance.
Added explicit whitespace-based counting and banned apostrophes/hyphens to reduce count drift. Also asked for a sharper final punchline so the humor lands more clearly.
Reframed the task into 9 lines of 11 words each so the exact 99-word count is easier to satisfy. Tightened the counting instructions and preserved the dry-humor punchline requirement.
Simplified the prompt to the bare essentials and emphasized 9 lines of 11 space-separated words. Switched toward clearer wording to improve literal constraint-following.

Changed the counting strategy: the model must internally build and verify a 99-word inventory before formatting the poem. Kept the humor and topic constraints while removing extra structure that models were ignoring.
Shifted to a single-paragraph prose poem to simplify whitespace counting. Made the final exact-99 check explicit and added a stronger invalid-if-not-99 warning.
